name: Sweet Potato Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, gently toss the cooked sweet potatoes and pineapple chunks.
2. Add the miniature marshmallows, chopped apples, flaked coconut, and walnuts.
3. Pour in the cool whip and mayonnaise (or dressing) and fold into the fruit mixture.
4. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
